seo.title: Wholesale Cabinet Signs — Trade Pricing for Sign Shops | Sunlite Signs
seo.metaDescription: Wholesale cabinet signs for sign shops only. Illuminated cabinet signs, push-through letters, and flex-face options. Trade pricing, German-engineered, UL listed. We never sell retail.

de.title: Großhandel Leuchtkästen — Trade Pricing for Sign Shops | Sunlite Signs
de.metaDescription: Großhandel Leuchtkästen for Schilderwerkstätten only. Illuminated Leuchtkästen, Durchsteck letters, and flex-face options. Händlerpreise, Mit deutscher Ingenieurskunst, UL-zertifiziert. Wir verkaufen nie an Endkunden.

data.subtitle: Illuminated cabinet signs, push-through letter cabinets, and flex-face options for every commercial application. Large-format signage engineered for maximum visibility. Available exclusively to trade accounts. UL listed. German-engineered. Wholesale direct to sign shops across the USA and Canada. We never sell retail — your clients stay yours.
data.image: Cabinet sign — illuminated storefront cabinet sign at night

de.subtitle: Illuminated Leuchtkästen, Durchsteck letter cabinets, and flex-face options for every commercial application. Large-format signage engineered for maximum visibility. Exklusiv für Händlerkonten verfügbar. UL-zertifiziert. Mit deutscher Ingenieurskunst. Großhandel direkt an Schilderwerkstätten across the USA und Kanada. Wir verkaufen nie an Endkunden — your clients stay yours.

data.heading: Wholesale Cabinet Sign Types
data.description: From standard illuminated cabinets to premium push-through and flex-face configurations. All available at trade pricing.

items.name: Standard Illuminated Cabinet
items.description: Internal LED cabinet with translucent polycarbonate or acrylic face. Uniform illumination for maximum visibility day and night. Welded aluminum construction with painted finish. Wholesale trade pricing for sign shops.
items.image: Illuminated cabinet sign — standard box sign, night view

items.name: Push-Through Letter Cabinet
items.description: Routed aluminum face with push-through acrylic letters. Dimensional daytime appearance with selective letter illumination at night. Premium aesthetic for retail and hospitality. Available exclusively to trade accounts.
items.image: Push-through letter cabinet sign — dimensional routed face with LED

items.name: Flex-Face Cabinet
items.description: Tensioned translucent vinyl face for full-color illuminated graphics. Easy face replacement for tenant changes. Ideal for multi-tenant retail and franchise applications. Wholesale direct to sign shops.
items.image: Flex-face cabinet sign — tensioned vinyl illuminated graphics

items.name: Double-Sided Cabinet
items.description: Illuminated on both sides for maximum exposure. Ideal for monument signs, pole signs, and median-facing applications. Engineered for wind load requirements. Trade pricing available.
items.image: Double-sided cabinet sign — illuminated monument sign

de.heading: Großhandel Cabinet Sign Types
de.description: From standard illuminated cabinets to premium Durchsteck and flex-face configurations. All available at Händlerpreise.

items.name: Standard Illuminated Cabinet
items.description: Internal LED cabinet with translucent polycarbonate or acrylic face. Uniform illumination for maximum visibility day and night. Welded aluminum construction with painted finish. Großhandel Händlerpreise for Schilderwerkstätten.

items.name: Durchsteck Letter Cabinet
items.description: Routed aluminum face with Durchsteck acrylic letters. Dimensional daytime appearance with selective letter illumination at night. Premium aesthetic for retail and hospitality. Exklusiv für Händlerkonten verfügbar.

items.name: Flex-Face Cabinet
items.description: Tensioned translucent vinyl face for full-color illuminated graphics. Easy face replacement for tenant changes. Ideal for multi-tenant retail and franchise applications. Großhandel direkt an Schilderwerkstätten.

items.name: Double-Sided Cabinet
items.description: Illuminated on both sides for maximum exposure. Ideal for monument signs, pole signs, and median-facing applications. Engineered for wind load requirements. Händlerpreise available.

items.title: Maximum Visibility
items.description: Large-format illuminated cabinet signs deliver high-impact brand presence visible from hundreds of feet away, day and night. Ideal for storefronts, shopping centers, and commercial buildings.

items.title: LED Illumination
items.description: High-efficiency LED modules provide uniform illumination across the entire face. Energy-efficient operation with 50,000+ hour rated life. Internal or edge-lit configurations available.

items.title: Custom Sizes & Shapes
items.description: Rectangular, curved, shaped, or fully custom cabinet profiles. From compact wall-mounted units to large freestanding monument signs. Sized to your project specifications.

items.title: Push-Through Letters
items.description: Routed aluminum faces with dimensional push-through acrylic letters. Combines daytime dimensional appearance with selective night illumination for a premium look.

items.title: Flex-Face Options
items.description: Tensioned translucent vinyl faces for full-color, edge-to-edge graphics. Easily replaceable faces for multi-tenant or seasonal branding applications.

items.title: UL Listed
items.description: All illuminated cabinet signs are UL listed with proper labeling and documentation for code compliance and permitting. Built to last with welded aluminum construction.

data.heading: Trade Specifications
data.description: Engineered for durability, visibility, and code compliance. Every cabinet sign includes complete electrical documentation and installation details. Available exclusively at wholesale trade pricing.
data.image: Cabinet sign — detail of welded aluminum cabinet construction

specs.label: Face Material
specs.value: Polycarbonate, acrylic, flex-face vinyl, or aluminum (push-through)

specs.label: LED System
specs.value: Internal LED modules, edge-lit, or backlit

specs.label: Graphics
specs.value: Vinyl, digital print, push-through acrylic, flex-face

specs.label: Finish
specs.value: Painted aluminum, powder coat, or anodized

specs.label: Mounting
specs.value: Wall mount, raceway, pole mount, monument base

specs.label: Electrical
specs.value: Remote or integrated power supply, UL listed

de.heading: Handelsspezifikationen
de.description: Engineered for durability, visibility, and code compliance. Every Leuchtkasten includes complete electrical documentation and installation details. Exklusiv zu Großhandelspreisen verfügbar.

data.heading: Common Applications
data.description: Cabinet signs are the workhorses of commercial signage. From retail storefronts to monument signs, they deliver reliable illuminated identification for every application. Wholesale direct to sign shops for all project types.
data.image: Cabinet signs — row of illuminated cabinet signs at shopping center

data.heading: Request Wholesale Pricing for
data.description: Send your cabinet sign specs, drawings, or project details and we will return a wholesale quote within 48 hours. No retail markup — just direct trade pricing.
